description: Create a content slide on Gen Z and Millennials using short social video for travel planning, with a left text narrative and a right stacked layout featuring an adoption summary and a grouped bar chart.

header.headline: Gen Zs, the biggest users of short social video in trip planning, are using the platform a little differently this year
header.sub: Broad inspiration still accounts for a large amount of travel video consumption, but more are using it for practical trip planning, searching full itineraries, and stay options

steps.label: Short social video app adoption in travel planning
steps.sub: Overall: 23%; Gen Z: 42%; Millennials: 33%. Trend shown across 2024, 2025, and 2026.

steps.label: Short social video content types used in discovery and trip planning

center.title: Short social video content types used in discovery and trip planning
